campaign_goal: Drive qualified quote and consultation callback requests without self-service appointment booking dependency.

request_background.theme: Premium Lisbon-region residential garden at golden hour, healthy layered greenery, clean stone paths, subtle terracotta accents, no stock-photo look.
request_background.ratio: 16:9 safe center crop with headline-safe negative space on left third.
request_background.exposition: Convey calm professionalism, reliability, and high-maintenance standards suitable for expat homeowners.

service_icon_maintenance.theme: Minimal line icon for recurring maintenance (pruning shears + leaf) in brand green on transparent background.
service_icon_maintenance.exposition: Represents subscription routine care and punctual repeat visits.

service_icon_irrigation.theme: Minimal line icon for irrigation checks (water droplet + sprinkler arc), consistent with maintenance icon style.
service_icon_irrigation.exposition: Represents irrigation inspection and adjustment reliability.

proof_block_before_after.theme: Matched-angle before/after photo pair of same garden zone with strong improvement visibility.
proof_block_before_after.ratio: 4:3 each panel, consistent framing between before and after.
proof_block_before_after.exposition: Demonstrate proof-of-work reporting standard and measurable upkeep quality.
proof_block_before_after.format: jpg, two files each 1600x1200 minimum, high quality with mild compression.

team_action_photo.theme: Founder/crew actively working in real garden environment, natural light, branded workwear optional but clean.
team_action_photo.exposition: Show hands-on execution, accountability, and founder-led operations.

cta_banner_visual.theme: Clean consultation callback banner visual with subtle phone/message motif integrated into garden context.
cta_banner_visual.exposition: Communicate callback-request action without implying self-service appointment booking.
